accessible_description: Rain-dark stone, pale lettering, and clear framed controls evoke a waterside borough; labels and shapes carry every state without relying on hue.
non_color_cues: Selected controls use a double outline and a check mark.
Warnings use a triangular icon and the word Warning.
Current-turn panels use a solid left rail and a Current turn heading.
border_style: Double-line selection frames with squared corners
heading_style: Compact civic-ledger headings with explicit text labels
